calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
David J. Cook, Esq., Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

The matter is not contested. No argument is held. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Align Technology's unopposed motion for Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order, and Turnover Order is granted.

Court to review the proposed order submitted by Mr. Cook.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:48 am and concluding at 9:58 am.

Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. is present represented by David Cook, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Lasting Impressions Dental Group, PLLC. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MARCO NARANJO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. and testifies.

Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Invoices..............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Pricing Terms and Conditions .........ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Pricing Terms and Conditions .........ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Pricing Terms and Conditions .........ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: Pricing Terms and Conditions .........ID/EVID
Exhibit 6: Pricing Terms and Conditions .........ID/EVID
Exhibit 7: Order Confirmation....................ID/EVID

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Align Technology Inc., and against Defendant Lasting Impressions Dental Group, PLLC., and Alison Deenen Scott aka Alison D. Scott DDS, aka Alison Scott, aka Alison Scott Cuillier, aka Alison Scott Cuillier DDS, an individual as follows:

1. Damages: $66,775.52
2. Prejudgment Interest: $7,681.80
3. Costs: $669.90
4. Attorney Fees: $1,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $76,127.22

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
